query: ( "heat alert" OR "heat health warning" OR "heat health action plan" OR "biometeorological forecast" OR "weather-based health alert" OR "forecast-triggered response" OR "threshold-based activation" OR "heat wave warning" OR "extreme heat alert" OR "heat health protection" OR "temperature threshold" ) AND ( "excess mortality" OR "excess deaths" OR "attributable mortality" OR "attributable mortality fraction" OR "heat-attributable morbidity" OR "cardiorespiratory admission" OR "ambulance call" OR "syndromic surveillance" OR "hospital admission" OR "emergency department" ) AND ( "causal inference" OR "policy evaluation" OR "synthetic control" OR "event study" OR "counterfactual" OR "treatment effect" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "difference in differences" OR "interrupted time series" OR "regression discontinuity" ) AND ( "urban heat" OR "heat vulnerability" OR "climate adaptation" OR "public health intervention" OR "environmental health" OR "climate-health" )
